title: PMMO Compact
description: This mod is basically a datapack for modded and vanilla items so you do not have to worry about making or configuring yourself!
body:
This is a mod version of the default datapack to run PMMO on 1.18.2 and above.

 

The way Project MMO works for 1.18.2 and above is through data packs. But to ensure you can manipulate every item in the game you need several different folders for this too work.

 So it causes a lot of lag.


Description 

- This mod is to help your modpacks reduce data pack lag for this specific mod: PMMO.


- Adding this mod will allow you to have already configured settings for vanilla and modded items, for mods i have listed below. 
And that are also featured in my modpack Strictly Medieval [FORGE] 2

- This is in the early stages, for there is a million items in any pack truly .

if you choose to only use a datapack: 
The datapack required to run this mod sets me at 1 FPS.

 

If you choose to run through a mod: 
adding this mod i went to 120 fps.

I will frequently add and update this mod when needed when i can!

CURRENT PMMO LEVELS CONFIGURED FOR:

- Alex mobs

- Aquaculture

- Ars Nouveau

- Biomes O PLenty

- Blood Magic

- Blue Skies

- Conjurer Illager

- Create

- Creeper Overhaul

- Croptopia

- Domum Ornamentum

- Dragon Mounts: Legacy

- Enchantment Machine

- Forbidden Arcanus

- Gobber2

- Greek Fantasy

- Hexerei

- Immersive Armors

- Kobalds

- Minecolonies

- Mowzies Mobs

- Aquamirae

- Core

- Relics

- Sophisticated Backpacks

- Tinkers Construct

- BumbleZone

- UnderGraden

- Upgraded Netherite, Items, Ultimate

- Villager Employment

- Wandering Bags

- WhisperWoods

- Medieval Siege Machines

- UNusualEnd

- Alocraft

- Gnumus Settlement



SUPPORT


If YOU HAVE FILES FOR PMMO THAT YOU'D LIKE IN THIS PACK I WILL GLADLY ADD THEM.
Join the discord for discussion.
